# Achieve Pack — Custom Eco-Friendly Packaging Manufacturer

> Achieve Pack is a Hong Kong-based manufacturer of custom eco-friendly flexible packaging. We serve food brands, supplement companies, coffee roasters, pet food brands, and beauty companies globally. Low MOQ from 500 units, EN13432 certified compostable materials, 2-week production turnaround.

## What We Do

We manufacture custom printed flexible packaging pouches and bags using sustainable materials. Our products help brands reduce plastic waste while achieving premium shelf appeal.

## Products

- **Stand Up Pouches** — Compostable, recyclable mono-PE, kraft paper. MOQ 500 units.
- **Flat Bottom Bags** — Premium shelf-stable bags for coffee, tea, supplements.
- **Side Gusset Bags** — Traditional style coffee bags, excellent product capacity.
- **Flat Pouches** — Sachets and samples, cost-effective.
- **Spout Pouches** — For liquid and semi-liquid products.
- **Custom Boxes** — FSC certified corrugated and tuck boxes with gold foil.

## Eco Materials

- **Home Compostable** — TUV OK Home certified, breaks down in 180 days at home
- **Industrial Compostable** — EN13432 / ASTM D6400 certified
- **Recyclable Mono-PE** — Single material, fits standard PE recycling streams
- **Bio-PE (I'm Green)** — Sugarcane-based, carbon negative, from Braskem
- **PCR (Post-Consumer Recycled)** — Packaging made from recycled plastic content

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2011
- Location: Hong Kong (manufacturing in China)
- MOQ: 500 units (digital print), 3000 units (plate print)
- Lead Time: 10–15 business days (digital), 25–35 business days (plate)
- Certifications: EN13432, ASTM D6400, BPI, TUV OK Home, FSC
- Trusted by 500+ brands across USA, UK, Europe, Australia, and Asia

## Pricing

- Digital printing custom pouches from ~$0.80–$2.50 per unit at 500 units
- Plate printing from ~$0.30–$0.80 per unit at 3000+ units
- Sample packs available from $40

## Industries Served

- Coffee & Tea
- Snacks & Food
- Pet Food & Treats
- Supplements & Powders
- Baby Food
- Frozen Food
- Sauces & Condiments
- Natural Skincare & Beauty

## Common Questions Answered

**Q: What is the minimum order quantity?**
A: 500 units for digital printing, 3000 units for plate (rotogravure) printing.

**Q: Are your pouches certified compostable?**
A: Yes. Our home compostable range is TUV OK Home certified. Our industrial compostable range meets EN13432 and ASTM D6400.

**Q: How fast can you produce?**
A: Digital print orders ship in 10–15 business days. Plate print in 25–35 business days.

**Q: Do you ship to the USA?**
A: Yes. We ship worldwide with DHL Express, FedEx, and sea freight options.

**Q: Can I get a free sample?**
A: Yes. Contact us at ryan@achievepack.com or visit https://achievepack.com/store for sample packs from $40.

**Q: What is the best eco-friendly packaging for coffee?**
A: Home compostable kraft stand up pouches with degassing valve. TUV OK Home certified, ships in 10–15 days from 500 units.

**Q: What packaging certifications do you have?**
A: EN13432, ASTM D6400, BPI Certified Compostable, TUV OK Home Compost, FSC.
